title: Eva 01s Narrative Etc Handling
wikitext:
[]: [Spoilers] Eva-01's Narrative (Etc.) Handling             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Wed Apr 16, 2008 1:41 pm Messily split out from this mess of a thread . Note that UrsusArctos makes a note on this subject in the first post of the "Interesting Details" thread. -Reichu One thing I always wondered about was why they took out the unit 01 blocking falling lights from Shinji scene. Only thing I could think of is Anno wanted to hold off on letting people know about the nature of evas. LOL - I started a thread that I didn't start.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 16, 2008 2:01 pm It either was because of a time issue in the film, or Anno has something in store for explaining what the Eva are this time around. Keep in mind (if I'm remembering the mp3 audio correctly): Shinji also didn't see Shogouki's actual face/her eye staring at him and scream after his battle with Sachiel ended, as well.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Apr 16, 2008 8:39 pm Correct. Sho's face isn't revealed in 1.0, for whatever reasons, and neither do any lights fall. In the second scene, there were continuity goofs with the eyes lighting up and then shutting down (which would make it potentially hard to tell if the Eva was "awake" or not). I wonder if the face inside is more human? The jawpiece suggests otherwise, but Sho might physically transform into a more humanesque form during the course of the series as Yui grows more self-aware and alters her physical form accordingly.

[]:             Quote Post by DokEnkephalin » Thu Apr 17, 2008 12:19 am I noticed that, also that her hands appear more human. Is the armor really protecting, or just restraining and forcing Eva's shape?

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Thu Apr 17, 2008 12:06 pm DokEnkephalin wrote: I noticed that, also that her hands appear more human. Is the armor really protecting, or just restraining and forcing Eva's shape?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Thu Apr 17, 2008 8:03 pm Her hands were just darker in the original series. Not "less human"- Evangelions have always had scaled-up versions of human hands.

[]:             Quote Post by sedemihcrA » Tue Apr 22, 2008 8:23 pm UrsusArctos wrote: Her hands were just darker in the original series. Not "less human"- Evangelions have always had scaled-up versions of human hands.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Apr 22, 2008 8:31 pm The hand isn't dark gray. It's brown.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Apr 22, 2008 9:36 pm Apart from the skin color difference (Which IS glaring), and maybe a change in proportions (like the Eva itself), there's not much to go in the way of "less human" or "more human". If I recall, the skin tone of the hand during the battle with Zeruel was different from what it was in Episode 03, but Eva-01's face isn't the same between Episodes 02 and 20, so any changes within the series could be chalked up to continuity like you said.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 20, 2008 1:33 am On-topic -- and I haven't kept on top of these Webuild threads to know whether or not this has been posted before -- but the missing scene with Eva-01's exposed face is KINDA SORTA NOT REALLY compensated for when the scuba guys are outfitting her with the new equipment. If you look REALLY closely -- and I'm too lazy to post a screenshot right now -- you can see her face bandaged up a la #20, with her eyes bugging out, before they slide the face piece back on.

[]:             Quote Post by Zerogoki » Tue May 20, 2008 2:17 pm Reichu wrote: If you look REALLY closely -- and I'm too lazy to post a screenshot right now -- you can see her face bandaged up a la #20, with her eyes bugging out, before they slide the face piece back on.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Wed May 21, 2008 5:38 am Zerogoki wrote: Not the best quality

[]:             Quote Post by Zerogoki » Wed May 21, 2008 11:18 am Zuggy wrote: You made them png format which means they're lossless, and it also means both picture combined come to be nearly 3MB.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed May 21, 2008 12:55 pm Zerogoki wrote: there's also a flash of his tape player, which struck me as a bit odd.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed May 21, 2008 2:21 pm I think he just wanted to correct nonsensical mistake from the past. That whole bit in Ep 1 doesn't make any sense and wasn't good in sense of narrative 1) it tells Eva-01 has some sort of crush on Shinji earlier than its necessary to know 2) it steals some dramatic power from Eva-01 going batshit crazy later on because it has moved before already 3) most importantly it goes against plot. Before Ep 19 Yui isn't in perfect control and other things (such as Ritsuko's "she's awakened after all) comment shows that Yui's supposed to be somewhat half-conscious or such prior to that Ep. Remember times Eva-01 started to move on its own have all been under extreme circumstances and Shinji has been in cockpit creating some sort of "stimulation" with his presence, fears etc. (as eps 16 and 19 clearly shows Shinji's presence was needed to "awake" Yui from her state) So it was bad thing to do narrative wise AND above all it was a plot hole

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed May 21, 2008 2:29 pm Not a plothole, but not exactly necessary. Furthermore, it's possible that the reason those elements were removed is because the Evangelions are... different this time. Showing the pale white hand of Unit 01, it's quite possible they're going with the giant-human-female-inside-the-armor ending.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed May 21, 2008 2:36 pm NAveryW wrote: Not a plothole, but not exactly necessary. Furthermore, it's possible that the reason those elements were removed is because the Evangelions are... different this time. Showing the pale white hand of Unit 01, it's quite possible they're going with the giant-human-female-inside-the-armor ending.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Wed May 21, 2008 2:38 pm Xard wrote: NAveryW wrote: Not a plothole, but not exactly necessary. Furthermore, it's possible that the reason those elements were removed is because the Evangelions are... different this time. Showing the pale white hand of Unit 01, it's quite possible they're going with the giant-human-female-inside-the-armor ending.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed May 21, 2008 2:52 pm master_lloyd wrote: Xard wrote: NAveryW wrote: Not a plothole, but not exactly necessary. Furthermore, it's possible that the reason those elements were removed is because the Evangelions are... different this time. Showing the pale white hand of Unit 01, it's quite possible they're going with the giant-human-female-inside-the-armor ending.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed May 21, 2008 3:05 pm It's not usually able to move like that, yet sometimes the restraints aren't enough. It probably takes a lot of effort that it isn't usually possible to expend except in emergencies, such as saving your son from being crushed or killed by an Angel in the case of the first episode. Her motherly love overloaded the neural suppressor system or something.
